name: VS Code 1.111 Autopilot
description: VS Code's first autonomous AI agent mode (Autopilot) that allows AI to work independently until task completion, with new permissions controls for agent autonomy. Switched VS Code to weekly release cadence.
community_quotes: First autonomous AI agent mode in VS Code
All new features in version 1.111 are AI-related
Users can control how much autonomy an AI agent has during sessions
Also referred to as 'YOLO mode' because it auto-accepts everything
Some developers find it 'scary' due to the autonomous nature

name: AutoResearch
description: An autonomous AI research lab that runs on a single GPU, allowing AI agents to run hundreds of experiments overnight and self-improve through iteration. Released by Andrej Karpathy with just 630 lines of Python code.
community_quotes: 10,000+ GitHub stars within days of release
A tiny but complete AI research lab
The agent modifies training scripts and iterates on improvements autonomously
